skill.name: maxhub-linkedin
skill.description: Access LinkedIn public data including user profiles, company information, job listings, and professional networks through a secure API intermediary. Activates when users mention LinkedIn, careers, companies, jobs, or networking.
skill.summary: Retrieve LinkedIn professional data including profiles, company info, and job listings via MaxHub API.
skill.author: MaxHub Team

security_audit.summary: All 194 static findings are FALSE_POSITIVES. The skill is documentation for a legitimate LinkedIn data retrieval API. All detected patterns are markdown code blocks showing API examples, not executable code. Environment variable access is for standard credential management. Network access is limited to a single, user-configured endpoint. No malicious intent detected.

low_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for API Credentials
low_findings.description: The skill accesses MAXHUB_API_KEY and MAXHUB_BASE_URL environment variables for authenticated API access. This is standard credential management practice.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Environment variable access is standard practice for API credential management, not a security vulnerability. The skill explicitly documents this access for authentication purposes only.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URLs for Documentation
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged hardcoded URLs pointing to MaxHub service endpoints (aconfig.cn). These are legitimate service endpoints documented for user configuration.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: URLs point to legitimate, documented service endpoints. Users configure their own API credentials through these documented endpoints.

content.user_title: Access LinkedIn professional profiles and job data
content.value_statement: Need to research companies, find contacts, or search for jobs on LinkedIn? This skill provides structured access to LinkedIn data through a secure API intermediary.
actual_capabilities: Retrieve LinkedIn user profiles including work experience, education, skills, and recommendations
Search for jobs by keyword and retrieve detailed job listings with requirements
Access company information including employee count, open positions, and company details
Get user follower counts, connection statistics, and engagement metrics
Fetch user posts, videos, images, and recent activity summaries
Search for people and companies on LinkedIn by keywords
limitations: Access is restricted to publicly available LinkedIn data through MaxHub API only
Cannot perform actions on LinkedIn such as posting, messaging, or sending connection requests
Rate limits apply: maximum 5 pages per request, 50 items per result, and 60 calls per minute
Network access is limited to the user-configured MaxHub endpoint only

use_cases.title: Research companies before interviews
use_cases.description: Recruiters and job seekers can gather company information including employee count, open positions, recent posts, and company culture insights before interviews.

use_cases.title: Build prospect lists for sales
use_cases.description: Sales professionals can search for potential customers by company, find decision-makers, and gather professional background information for outreach.

use_cases.title: Prepare for networking events
use_cases.description: Conference attendees can look up attendees and speakers beforehand to prepare meaningful conversations and follow-up messages.

prompt_templates.title: Find people at a company
prompt_templates.prompt: Search LinkedIn for people who work at [Company Name] in [City/Region]. Show me their titles and any shared connections.
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need to find contacts at a specific company

prompt_templates.title: Research a job posting
prompt_templates.prompt: Look up this LinkedIn job: [Job URL or job_id]. Get the full description, requirements, and information about the hiring manager if available.
prompt_templates.scenario: When researching a specific job opportunity

prompt_templates.title: Compare companies
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare these two companies on LinkedIn: [Company A] vs [Company B]. Include employee count, growth trends, open positions, and company culture indicators.

prompt_templates.title: Find profile details for outreach
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the full profile for [LinkedIn username]. Include their current role, past experience, skills, and any recent posts about [topic of interest].

output_examples.input: Look up Satya Nadella's LinkedIn profile
output_examples.output: Satya Nadella is CEO of Microsoft. He previously served as Executive Vice President of Microsoft's Cloud and Enterprise Group. His education includes a Master's in Computer Science from University of Wisconsin-Milwaukee and an MBA from University of Chicago Booth School of Business. Skills include Cloud Computing, Enterprise Software, and Leadership. His recent activity includes posts on AI innovation and digital transformation topics.

output_examples.input: Find software engineering jobs at Google in Seattle
output_examples.output: Found 47 software engineering positions at Google Seattle. Top roles include: Senior Software Engineer (L5), Machine Learning Engineer, and Site Reliability Engineer. Average posting age is 12 days. Common requirements: 5+ years experience, Python/Java proficiency, distributed systems experience.

best_practices: Use specific search terms and filters to get targeted results rather than broad searches
Respect rate limits by spacing out bulk requests and using pagination for large datasets
Verify data currency by noting when profiles were last updated on LinkedIn
anti_patterns: Do not use this skill to collect data for spam campaigns or unsolicited outreach
Avoid making rapid sequential calls that could trigger rate limiting
Do not attempt to access private profiles or restricted LinkedIn content

faq.question: What LinkedIn data can this skill access?
faq.answer: This skill accesses publicly available LinkedIn data including user profiles, company pages, job listings, posts, and search results. It cannot access private profiles or restricted content.

faq.question: Do I need a LinkedIn account to use this skill?
faq.answer: No, you need a MaxHub API key instead. The skill accesses LinkedIn data through MaxHub's API intermediary, so you do not need your own LinkedIn account.

faq.question: Can this skill post content or send messages on LinkedIn?
faq.answer: No, this skill is read-only. It can only retrieve data from LinkedIn and cannot perform actions like posting, messaging, or sending connection requests.

faq.question: How do I get a MaxHub API key?
faq.answer: Visit aconfig.cn to register for an account and create an API key. Then configure MAXHUB_API_KEY and MAXHUB_BASE_URL environment variables.

faq.question: What are the rate limits?
faq.answer: The skill limits requests to 5 pages per query, 50 items per result, 60 calls per minute, and 3 levels of chained API calls. You will be warned when approaching these limits.

faq.question: Is the data retrieved through this skill kept private?
faq.answer: All API requests use HTTPS encryption. Your API key is passed via environment variables and is not stored or logged. The skill does not access your local system.
